texto: I am as sure as I live that nothing is so near to me as God. God is nearer to me than I am to myself
autor: my existence depends on the nearness and the presence of God.
explicacao: Citação de my existence depends on the nearness and the presence of God. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I am as sure as I live that nothing is so near to me as God. God is nearer to me than I am to myself” articula reflexao, meister-eckhart, nothing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
